name: LAURN-GROVE
description: LAURN-GROVE is a place to play pickleball in Hancock, MI. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: U.P. Courts
description: Come play pickleball at U.P. Courts in Hancock, MI! There are 3 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play.
